classification.loc_class: QC - Physics: waves, acoustics, and fluid dynamics

theory.canonical_statement: ID3302 records Gyromagnetic Lagrangian Divergence Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\QuantumTopoHoloNavSystem_formatted2.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: \begin{align} \mathcal{L}_ \text{total} &= \underbrace{ \frac{1}{2} \boldsymbol{ \omega} \cdot ( \mathbb{I} \cdot \boldsymbol{ \omega})}_{ \text{gyroscopic KE}} + \underbrace{ \frac{1}{2}m \dot{ \mathbf{r}}^2}_{ \text{translational KE}} + \underbrace{ \frac{ \varepsilon_0}{2} \int \left( \frac{ \partial \mathbf{A}}{ \partial t} \right)^2 d^3x}_{ \text{EM field KE}} \\ & \quad + \underbrace{ \frac{ \rho}{2} \int \dot{ \mathbf{u}}^2 \, d^3x}_{ \text{acoustic KE}} - \underbrace{ \frac{ \rho c_s^2}{2} \int ( \nabla \cdot \mathbf{u})^2 d^3x}_{ \text{elastic PE}} \\ & \quad - \underbrace{ \boldsymbol{ \mu} \cdot \mathbf{B}_ \text{ext}}_{ \text{Zeeman}} + \underbrace{ \lambda_g \int \mathbf{u} \cdo ...
canonical_equation.source_section_latex: \begin{align} \mathcal{L}_ \text{total} &= \underbrace{ \frac{1}{2} \boldsymbol{ \omega} \cdot ( \mathbb{I} \cdot \boldsymbol{ \omega})}_{ \text{gyroscopic KE}} + \underbrace{ \frac{1}{2}m \dot{ \mathbf{r}}^2}_{ \text{translational KE}} + \underbrace{ \frac{ \varepsilon_0}{2} \int \left( \frac{ \partial \mathbf{A}}{ \partial t} \right)^2 d^3x}_{ \text{EM field KE}} \\ & \quad + \underbrace{ \frac{ \rho}{2} \int \dot{ \mathbf{u}}^2 \, d^3x}_{ \text{acoustic KE}} - \underbrace{ \frac{ \rho c_s^2}{2} \int ( \nabla \cdot \mathbf{u})^2 d^3x}_{ \text{elastic PE}} \\ & \quad - \underbrace{ \boldsymbol{ \mu} \cdot \mathbf{B}_ \text{ext}}_{ \text{Zeeman}} + \underbrace{ \lambda_g \int \mathbf{u} \cdo ...

wolfram_form.existing_from_tex: \begin{align} \mathcal{L}_ \text{total} &= \underbrace{ \frac{1}{2} \boldsymbol{ \omega} \cdot ( \mathbb{I} \cdot \boldsymbol{ \omega})}_{ \text{gyroscopic KE}} + \underbrace{ \frac{1}{2}m \dot{ \mathbf{r}}^2}_{ \text{translational KE}} + \underbrace{ \frac{ \varepsilon_0}{2} \int \left( \frac{ \partial \mathbf{A}}{ \partial t} \right)^2 d^3x}_{ \text{EM field KE}} \\ & \quad + \underbrace{ \frac{ \rho}{2} \int \dot{ \mathbf{u}}^2 \, d^3x}_{ \text{acoustic KE}} - \underbrace{ \frac{ \rho c_s^2}{2} \int ( \nabla \cdot \mathbf{u})^2 d^3x}_{ \text{elastic PE}} \\ & \quad - \underbrace{ \boldsymbol{ \mu} \cdot \mathbf{B}_ \text{ext}}_{ \text{Zeeman}} + \underbrace{ \lambda_g \int \mathbf{u} \cdo ...
